The term of office of the Committee shall be three years.
3. The functions of the said Committee are as follows.
1. To regulate the enforcement of the Contraception Act.
2. To inspect Sonography Centre / Genetic Counselling Centre and for
Seek help from the appropriate authorities concerned.
3. Machine if fault is found at Sonography Centre / Genetic Counselling Centre.
